grid.title: Lista de Fornecedores
grid.expression: SELECT CODPARC , NOMEPARC , ROUND(NVL(PERCENTUALDESVIO,100),2) AS PERCENTUALDESVIO , ROUND(NVL(PONTUACAO,0),2) AS PONTUACAO , CASE WHEN NVL(PERCENTUALDESVIO,100)> 0 AND NVL(PONTUACAO,0)> 0 THEN ROUND((NVL(PERCENTUALDESVIO,100) + NVL(PONTUACAO,0))/2,2) ELSE ROUND(NVL(PERCENTUALDESVIO,100) + NVL(PONTUACAO,0),2) END AS PONTUACAOMEDIA FROM (SELECT PAR.CODPARC , PAR.NOMEPARC , (SELECT SUM (CASE WHEN NVL (CNTA.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE)) - PED.DTINICIO <= 0 THEN 100 WHEN NVL (CNTA.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE))- PED.DTINICIO <= 2 THEN 60 ELSE 20 END) / COUNT (*) AS PONTUACAOENTREGA FROM TGFVAR VAR , TGFITE PED , TGFITE NTA , TGFCAB CPED , TGFCAB CNTA , TGFPRO PRO WHERE VAR.NUNOTAORIG = PED.NUNOTA AND VAR.SEQUENCIAORIG = PED.SEQUENCIA AND VAR.NUNOTA = NTA.NUNOTA AND VAR.SEQUENCIA = NTA.SEQUENCIA AND VAR.NUNOTA = CNTA.NUNOTA AND VAR.NUNOTAORIG = CPED.NUNOTA AND PED.CODPROD = PRO.CODPROD AND CPED.TIPMOV = 'O' AND CPED.CODPARC = PAR.CODPARC AND CNTA.DTNEG BETWEEN :PERIODO.INI AND :PERIODO.FIN) AS PONTUACAO , (SELECT SUM(RNC.PERCENTUALDESVIO) / COUNT (*) FROM TGQRNC RNC INNER JOIN TGQRNCDET DET ON RNC.RNCID = DET.RNCID INNER JOIN TGFCAB CAB ON (CAB.NUNOTA = DET.NUNOTA) INNER JOIN TGFITE ITE ON ITE.NUNOTA = CAB.NUNOTA AND DET.NUNOTA = ITE.NUNOTA AND DET.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD AND DET.SEQUENCIA = ITE.SEQUENCIA INNER JOIN TGFPRO PRO ON PRO.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD WHERE CAB.TIPMOV = 'C' AND CAB.CODPARC = PAR.CODPARC AND CAB.DTNEG BETWEEN :PERIODO.INI AND :PERIODO.FIN) AS PERCENTUALDESVIO FROM TGFPAR PAR WHERE PAR.CODPARC <> 0 AND PAR.FORNECEDOR = 'S' AND (NVL(:CODPARC, -1) = -1 OR NVL(:CODPARC, -1) = PAR.CODPARC) UNION SELECT PAR.CODPARC , PAR.NOMEPARC , (SELECT SUM (CASE WHEN NVL (CNTA.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE)) - PED.DTINICIO <= 0 THEN 100 WHEN NVL (CNTA.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE))- PED.DTINICIO <= 2 THEN 60 ELSE 20 END) / COUNT (*) AS PONTUACAOENTREGA FROM TGFVAR VAR , TGFITE PED , TGFITE NTA , TGFCAB CPED , TGFCAB CNTA , TGFPRO PRO WHERE VAR.NUNOTAORIG = PED.NUNOTA AND VAR.SEQUENCIAORIG = PED.SEQUENCIA AND VAR.NUNOTA = NTA.NUNOTA AND VAR.SEQUENCIA = NTA.SEQUENCIA AND VAR.NUNOTA = CNTA.NUNOTA AND VAR.NUNOTAORIG = CPED.NUNOTA AND PED.CODPROD = PRO.CODPROD AND CPED.CODPARCTRANSP = PAR.CODPARC AND CNTA.DTNEG BETWEEN :PERIODO.INI AND :PERIODO.FIN) AS PONTUACAO , (SELECT sum(RNC.PERCENTUALDESVIO) / COUNT (*) FROM TGQRNC RNC INNER JOIN TGQRNCDET DET ON RNC.RNCID = DET.RNCID INNER JOIN TGFCAB CAB ON (CAB.NUNOTA = DET.NUNOTA) INNER JOIN TGFITE ITE ON ITE.NUNOTA = CAB.NUNOTA AND DET.NUNOTA = ITE.NUNOTA AND DET.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD AND DET.SEQUENCIA = ITE.SEQUENCIA INNER JOIN TGFPRO PRO ON PRO.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD WHERE CAB.TIPMOV = 'C' AND CAB.CODPARCTRANSP = PAR.CODPARC AND CAB.DTNEG BETWEEN :PERIODO.INI AND :PERIODO.FIN) AS PERCENTUALDESVIO FROM TGFPAR PAR WHERE PAR.CODPARC <> 0 AND PAR.TRANSPORTADORA = 'S' AND (NVL(:CODPARC, -1) = -1 OR NVL(:CODPARC, -1) = PAR.CODPARC)) WHERE (PERCENTUALDESVIO > 0 OR PONTUACAO > 0) ORDER BY CODPARC

chart.title: Produto
chart.expression: SELECT PRO.DESCRPROD, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL (CAB.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE)) - ITE.DTINICIO <= 0 THEN 100 WHEN NVL (CAB.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE)) - ITE.DTINICIO <= 2 THEN 60 ELSE 20 END) / COUNT(*) PONTUACAO, SUM(NVL(RNC.PERCENTUALDESVIO,0)) PONTUACAONC FROM TGFCAB CAB LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFVAR VAR on VAR.NUNOTA = CAB.NUNOTA LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFITE ITE ON ITE.NUNOTA = VAR.NUNOTAORIG AND ITE.SEQUENCIA = VAR.SEQUENCIAORIG LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFPRO PRO ON PRO.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD LEFT OUTER JOIN TSIEMP EMP ON EMP.CODEMP = CAB.CODEMP LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFPAR PAR ON PAR.CODPARC = CAB.CODPARC LEFT OUTER JOIN TGQRNCDET DET ON DET.NUNOTA = ITE.NUNOTA AND DET.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD AND DET.SEQUENCIA = ITE.SEQUENCIA LEFT OUTER JOIN TGQRNC RNC ON RNC.RNCID = DET.RNCID WHERE CAB.TIPMOV = 'C' AND CAB.CODPARC = :A_CODPARC AND CAB.DTNEG BETWEEN :PERIODO.INI AND :PERIODO.FIN GROUP BY PRO.DESCRPROD

grid.title: Relação de Notas por Fornecedores
grid.expression: SELECT CAB.NUNOTA, CAB.CODEMP, EMP.NOMEFANTASIA, CAB.CODPARC, PAR.NOMEPARC, ITE.CODPROD, PRO.DESCRPROD, CASE WHEN NVL (CAB.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE)) - ITE.DTINICIO <= 0 THEN 100 WHEN NVL (CAB.DTNEG, TRUNC (SYSDATE)) - ITE.DTINICIO <= 2 THEN 60 ELSE 20 END PONTUACAO, DET.RNCID NC, NVL(RNC.PERCENTUALDESVIO,100) PONTUACAONC, RNC.DATAREGISTRO DATANC, RNC.DATAPREVENCERRAR DATAPREVISTA FROM TGFCAB CAB LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFITE ITE ON ITE.NUNOTA = CAB.NUNOTA LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFPRO PRO ON PRO.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD LEFT OUTER JOIN TSIEMP EMP ON EMP.CODEMP = CAB.CODEMP LEFT OUTER JOIN TGFPAR PAR ON PAR.CODPARC = CAB.CODPARC LEFT OUTER JOIN TGQRNCDET DET ON DET.NUNOTA = ITE.NUNOTA AND DET.CODPROD = ITE.CODPROD AND DET.SEQUENCIA = ITE.SEQUENCIA LEFT OUTER JOIN TGQRNC RNC ON RNC.RNCID = DET.RNCID WHERE CAB.TIPMOV = 'C' AND (CAB.CODPARC = :A_CODPARC OR CAB.CODPARCTRANSP = :A_CODPARC) AND CAB.DTNEG BETWEEN :PERIODO.INI AND :PERIODO.FIN AND CAB.NUNOTA = NVL(:NUNOTA, CAB.NUNOTA)
